productDisplayName: Nike Men's Breakli Navy Blue Track Pants
description: Composition Blue tracks made of 100% cotton with green stitch detailing on the sides, elastic waist with drawcord, a discreet pocket at the back and two side pockets Fitting Comfort Wash care Machine wash cold at 30 degrees with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low Remove immediately/do not allow to lay on itself when wet Cool iron, but do not iron on design Do not dry clean Built with the breathability and zero-distraction Fit athletes demands for focus, the nike running shorts come in a front-to-back color-block design, including hi-vis features for night workouts. These high-performance shorts feature a supportive two-in-one cut built with fabric that rapidly moves sweat away from the body.
